expectations.text: Includes both feed ad and story ad copy
expectations.evidence: Includes both a feed ad (with primary text, headline, description, CTA button) and a story ad (3-frame sequence).

expectations.text: Feed ad opens with a strong first-line hook
expectations.evidence: 'You don't need another serum that promises miracles overnight.' — good hook that speaks to the skeptic audience.

expectations.text: Copy focuses on skin benefits, not just ingredient specs
expectations.evidence: Mentions ingredients but frames around 'cleaner skin science'. Could be slightly more benefit-specific (doesn't mention specific outcomes like 'fades dark spots' or 'evens skin tone').

expectations.text: No region-specific slang or idioms (global audience safe)
expectations.evidence: Clean, simple English throughout. No idioms or region-specific language.

expectations.text: Includes a clear call to action
expectations.evidence: CTA Button: 'Shop Now', 'Swipe Up to Shop'. Clear but generic.
Only 1 feed ad and 1 story ad provided. No variations or alternative approaches.
